caption: A man with short, dark hair and wearing black headphones sits in front of a professional studio microphone. He is wearing a dark black shirt over a grey undergarment. The background consists of grey, ribbed acoustic foam panels. The man is positioned behind a microphone mounted on a black boom arm. Across the sequence, the man remains stationary, but his gaze shifts. He begins by looking straight ahead with a neutral expression, then glances upward and to his right. His focus then returns toward the center before shifting slightly to his left. His lips are slightly parted as if he is speaking or about to speak into the microphone. There is no on-screen text or logos visible in the scene.
